title: Tome of Wonders
description: Wacky new mobs and other features
body:
![Squilliam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c0a0220fdc21aa4309c93fa72d5f785a8e12e77.png)
## About Tome of Wonders
Tome of Wonders adds many wonderful and wacky new mobs and features.

## Mod Loader and Version
This mod is currently being developed for Forge 1.20.1. No backports are planned. We will port the mod to newer versions when we feel the time is right. For 1.21.1 and beyond, the mod will use NeoForge.
